description: A premium black cotton t shirt with non toxic phosphorescent print that charges under light and glows in the dark. Unisex modern fit, soft hand feel, and machine washable.
materials: 100% combed ringspun cotton; non-toxic phosphorescent ink

notes.care: Machine wash cold inside out, tumble dry low, do not iron print.
notes.glow_tip: Expose to bright light for 1-2 minutes for best glow.
